summary:
IL-18 plays a critical role in shaping T-cell differentiation through promoting Th1 responses during thymic selection. Its involvement in diseases involving thymic lymphoproliferation further supports its significance in thymic immunity.  

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{A}}$
